cards.name: Queen of Swords
cards.interpretation: honest, independent, principled, fair, constructive criticism, objective, perceptive

cards.name: Queen of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: selfish, unkempt, jealous, insecure, greedy, materialistic, gold digger, intolerant, self-absorbed, envious

cards.name: 2 of Cups
cards.interpretation: unity, partnership, attraction, connection, close bonds, joining forces, mutual respect
